base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Expected to reduce low-quality STALE_0DTE fallback exposure and improve fallback PnL/exposure while leaving VALID_0DTE pullback, charm-pin, squeeze, and charm-wall engines unchanged. Main tradeoff is losing one or two profitable but inefficient stale fallback winners; reject if total net profit falls more than 2%, fallback PnL turns negative, or the single EXPIRED_0DTE breakout winner is lost without offsetting exposure/MAE improvement.
label: promote
rationale: Choose Batch G because the current leader is already strong and broad VALID_0DTE pruning is too expensive. The weakest separable slice is no-0DTE stale fallback, especially breakout_long_no_0dte: 2 stale trades, $71 PnL, 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. This is one logical family, uses only routed fallback profile keys, and avoids option-confirmed profiles when 0DTE data is stale or unavailable.
